Alexander Jenkins

Finance and accounting double major, CFA Level I Candidate, and CPA-focused student building experience in wealth management, tax planning, and investment analysis.

Alexander Jenkins' Resume

Education

Finance and Accounting double major studying at High Point University in High Point, North Carolina. Graduating in May 2027 with high honors, making the Dean's List every semester. Business Honors student known as a Business Fellow and recipient of the CFA Program Student Scholarship to take the Level I exam.

Experience

Targeted internship experience in wealth management and financial analysis, focusing on client portfolio functions, tax considerations, and rigorous investment evaluation.

Skills

Financial modeling, investment analysis, reporting, advanced Excel, tax analysis, individual tax return preparation, and preparation for rigorous professional credentials including the CFA curriculum.

Alexander J. Jenkins

alex.jenkins310@gmail.com | 412-926-2916 | Pittsburgh, PA | linkedin.com/in/alexjenkins04

High-achieving Finance and Accounting double major and CFA Level I Candidate. Proficient in advanced financial modeling and data analysis within Excel. Intending to pursue CPA licensure to deliver precise analytical solutions backed by a solid background in tax and financial modeling.

Experience

Aufman Associates Sewickley, PA
Tax & Planning Intern May 2026 - August 2026
  • Prepared and analyzed over 200 tax projections by directly reviewing tax returns and supporting documents.
  • Modeled Roth IRA conversion strategies by evaluating tax brackets to leverage current-year negative tax liabilities.
  • Optimized and automated complex tax calculation spreadsheets in Excel, reducing manual input errors.
Wealth Management Intern May 2025 - August 2025
  • Collaborated with licensed CFA and CFP professionals serving clients in wealth management.
  • Developed and recommended comprehensive investment plans by understanding client goals.
  • Constructed a comprehensive tax planning Excel formula incorporating new tax laws.
  • Analyzed asset allocations for 230+ clients and prepared individualized memorandums outlining next steps.
Outlier Remote Work
AI Response Trainer July 2024 - March 2025
  • Enhanced next-generation AI models by providing detailed feedback and training inputs.
  • Evaluated and justified AI outputs to ensure optimal response accuracy.
  • Delivered critical subject-matter feedback to improve model reliability and consistency.

Skills and Qualifications

  • Courses: Corporate Finance, Advanced Accounting, Financial Analysis, Advanced Tax, Econometrics, and Audit.
  • Technical: Excel, PowerPoint, Tableau, Black Diamond Wealth Solutions, and QuickBooks Online.
  • Tax: Tax analysis, tax projection review, and individual tax return preparation.
